source_title: Minnesota OSHA fatality investigation summary — Federal-fiscal-year 2024 (Oct. 1, 2023, through Sept. 30, 2024)
issuing_body: Minnesota OSHA (MNOSHA), under the Minnesota Department of Labor and Industry
notes: Public state-plan OSHA fatality summary published as a PDF by the Minnesota DLI. Period covered: Federal-fiscal-year 2024 (Oct. 1, 2023 through Sept. 30, 2024); document updated April 21, 2026. The dataset is intentionally sparse: 32 fatality entries with 30 unique inspection numbers (two entries list two contractor inspections each); 4 entries have no inspection number; outcome statuses span 'Citations issued' / 'Citation issued' / 'No citations issued' / 'Case open' / 'No inspection – not work-related' / 'No inspection – farm appropriations rider.' Entries do not include deceased employee names or specific employer/company names. The recurring page header directs readers to osha.gov/data for the underlying inspection and citation data.
